stemHtml: An aircraft is equipped with 2 HFEs (hand held fire extinguishers) in the flight deck. May the aircraft be dispatched if one of the HFEs is broken?

options.a: Yes but the remaining HFE must be larger.
options.b: Yes, if this is approved by the competent authority
options.c: The aircraft can depart with one HFE available.
options.d: The aircraft can not depart with one HFE available.
